groups.title: Job Title & Role
groups.description: Filter by title terms, seniority, function, and role logic.

fields.title: Include Job Titles
fields.description: Only return people whose job title matches one of these terms.
fields.bestPractice: Start with 1–3 core titles. Add more only if results are too low.

fields.title: Exclude Job Titles
fields.description: Exclude people whose title contains any of these terms.
fields.bestPractice: Use excludes to remove bad matches like assistant, junior, intern.

fields.title: Include Title Variants
fields.description: Automatically expand title matching to include common synonyms and variants.
fields.bestPractice: Keep ON unless you need very strict exact-title matching.

fields.title: Include Seniority
fields.description: Filter by seniority level.
fields.bestPractice: Combine with title filters for precision.

fields.title: Exclude Seniority
fields.description: Exclude specific seniority levels.
fields.bestPractice: Exclude intern/entry for B2B decision-maker targeting.

fields.title: Include Department / Function
fields.description: Target people in specific departments.
fields.bestPractice: Use alongside title filters for tighter targeting.

fields.title: Role Match Mode

options.label: All — must match all title terms

fields.description: How strictly job titles are matched.
fields.bestPractice: Use 'exact' for precision. Use 'any' when results are too low.

groups.title: Contact Info
groups.description: Require contact channels, email deliverability state, and name matching.

fields.title: Has Email
fields.description: Only return people with a known email address.
fields.bestPractice: Turn ON when email outreach is required. Leave OFF for maximum volume.

fields.title: Has Phone
fields.description: Only return people with a known phone number.
fields.bestPractice: Turn ON only when phone is required — reduces volume significantly.

fields.title: Email Status
fields.description: Filter by email deliverability status.
fields.bestPractice: For outbound campaigns, start with 'verified' only.

fields.title: First Name Contains
fields.description: Only return people whose first name matches.
fields.bestPractice: Use sparingly — only when targeting a named individual.

fields.title: Last Name Contains
fields.description: Only return people whose last name matches.
fields.bestPractice: Use sparingly — only when targeting a named individual.

groups.title: Location — Person
groups.description: Filter by where the person is based.

fields.title: Country (Include)
fields.description: Only return people based in these countries.
fields.bestPractice: Set country first before adding state or city for cleaner targeting.

fields.title: Country (Exclude)
fields.description: Exclude people from these countries.
fields.bestPractice: Use to remove countries with noisy or irrelevant results.

fields.title: State / Region (Include)
fields.description: Only return people in these states or regions.
fields.bestPractice: Add state only after setting country.

fields.title: City (Include)
fields.description: Only return people in these cities.
fields.bestPractice: Use city last for precision once volume is validated.

groups.title: Company
groups.description: Filter by company name and industry.

fields.title: Company Name Contains
fields.description: Only return people at companies whose name contains these terms.
fields.bestPractice: Use for targeted account lists. Combine with domain for precision.

fields.title: Company Name Excludes
fields.description: Exclude people at companies whose name contains these terms.
fields.bestPractice: Remove known bad company types like staffing or consulting firms.

fields.title: Industry (Include)
fields.description: Only return people at companies in these industries.
fields.bestPractice: Start with a small industry set. Expand after validating result quality.

fields.title: Industry (Exclude)
fields.description: Exclude people at companies in these industries.
fields.bestPractice: Exclude noisy verticals that keep showing up in bad results.

fields.title: Company Match Mode

options.label: All — must match all company filters

fields.description: How company name and industry filters are combined.
fields.bestPractice: Use 'any' for broad targeting. Use 'all' for strict account matching.

groups.title: Company Keywords
groups.description: Filter by company keyword matching — broader than industry.

fields.title: Keywords (Include)
fields.description: Only return companies whose profile contains these keywords.
fields.bestPractice: Use for niche verticals not covered by standard industry options.

fields.title: Keywords (Exclude)
fields.description: Exclude companies whose profile contains these keywords.
fields.bestPractice: Remove low-quality company types from results.

fields.title: Keyword Match Mode
fields.description: How company keywords are matched.
fields.bestPractice: Use broad for discovery. Use exact for precision targeting.

groups.title: Company Size
groups.description: Filter by company size buckets and custom employee ranges.

fields.title: Company Size (Include)
fields.description: Only return people at companies in these size ranges.
fields.bestPractice: Avoid micro businesses — start with 51+ for B2B decision-makers.

fields.title: Company Size (Exclude)
fields.description: Exclude companies in these size ranges.
fields.bestPractice: Exclude 1–10 to remove sole traders and micro businesses.

fields.title: Custom Min Employees
fields.description: Custom minimum employee count — overrides size bucket lower bound.
fields.bestPractice: Use with max for exact ranges when buckets are too broad.

fields.title: Custom Max Employees
fields.description: Custom maximum employee count — overrides size bucket upper bound.
fields.bestPractice: Leave empty unless you need precision beyond standard buckets.

groups.title: Company Domain
groups.description: Filter by exact or partial domain matching.

fields.title: Domain (Include)
fields.description: Only return people at companies with these domains.
fields.bestPractice: Use for exact target account lists. Switch to strict mode to avoid false positives.

fields.title: Domain (Exclude)
fields.description: Exclude people at companies with these domains.
fields.bestPractice: Exclude free email providers to remove personal accounts.

fields.title: Domain Match Mode
fields.description: How company domains are matched.
fields.bestPractice: Use strict for exact domains. Use contains only for broad discovery.

groups.title: Location — Company
groups.description: Filter by where the company is headquartered.

fields.title: HQ Country (Include)
fields.description: Only return companies headquartered in these countries.
fields.bestPractice: Use when HQ country matters more than person location.

fields.title: HQ Country (Exclude)
fields.description: Exclude companies headquartered in these countries.
fields.bestPractice: Exclude countries with foreign multinationals if targeting local companies.

fields.title: HQ State / Region (Include)
fields.description: Only return companies headquartered in these states or regions.
fields.bestPractice: Add after setting country to avoid over-filtering.

fields.title: HQ City (Include)
fields.description: Only return companies headquartered in these cities.
fields.bestPractice: Use city last for maximum precision.

groups.title: Revenue & Funding
groups.description: Filter by annual revenue bucket and funding stage.

fields.title: Annual Revenue (Include)
fields.description: Only return companies in these annual revenue ranges.
fields.bestPractice: Start broad, then tighten once you confirm enough matching volume.

fields.title: Funding Stage (Include)
fields.description: Only return companies at these funding stages.
fields.bestPractice: Use only when stage fit matters for your outreach strategy.

groups.title: Run Options
groups.description: Control how many leads to extract and run behaviour.

fields.title: Max Leads to Extract
fields.description: Maximum number of leads to extract in this run.
fields.bestPractice: Start with 100–200 to validate quality before running at full volume.
